title: FBS
body:
# **FASTER, BETTER, STRONGER!**
________________________________________________________________________
**_FBS MEANS FASTER, BETTER, STRONGER.
THESE MOD PACK IMPROVING YOUR MINECRAFT QUALITY AND OPTIMIZE IT._**
________________________________________________________________________
## **It features:**

> - _Atmospheric sound_
> - _Visual improvements_
> - _Many performance mods to make it **faster**_
> - _Shaders and Optifine Resource packs support to make it **better**_
> - _Compatible with Servers to make it **stronger**_
> - _Simple Voice chat_
> - _More animations_
> - _Gui extensions_
> - _Gamepad support_
________________________________________________________________________
### **subscribe on mrsalek. <3**
